title: landolphia scandens var. rotundifolia
intro: Landolphia scandens var. rotundifolia, also known as the rounded-stemmed milking vine, is a tropical plant species native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Landolphia scandens var. rotundifolia include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are then used to treat various health conditions.
